barRaise.topFinding: The trajectory improved this cycle but the loop surfaced a new failure mode. The sixteen-release maintenance burst from 06-17 stopped (HEAD has not moved off v0.58.40 for roughly two days), the queue stopped dropping its own items, and the ASSETS.md manifest drift flagged for three straight cycles was finally regenerated. But the regen is sitting uncommitted in the live working tree while both the 06-19 canonical audit and drift-fix credited it as resolved and the audit reported a clean tree, so the loop is now reporting work as shipped that has not shipped and Rising.json workTreeClean is a false positive. Highest-leverage: commit the stranded ASSETS regen (one command), then land br-release-footer-and-automsg-gate (the two release.ps1 guards), then make the next session an M1 mechanics row. M1 has held at 40% since 2026-06-10, nine days.

actions.title: Commit the stranded docs/ASSETS.md regen (uncommitted since 06-18, credited as resolved by two reports but never shipped); then close br-assets-manifest-regen-2026-06-18.
Land br-release-footer-and-automsg-gate-2026-06-18 (two release.ps1 preship guards); fifth audit running, the only durable closer for the footer-gap and bare-message classes.
Re-run write-dashboard-status (corrects workTreeClean and workQueueDepth 12 -> 18) and wire the canonical-audit skill to populate the Rising.json audit block.
Make the next focused session an M1 mechanics row (Hold the Wall mission script or save/load); M1 has held at 40% for nine days.
Backfill GDD footer entries v0.58.14 through v0.58.40. Queued as br-gdd-footer-v05814-v05840-2026-06-18.
Rewrite the sixteen bare CHANGELOG entries v0.58.25-v0.58.40 to describe their work. Queued as br-changelog-bare-automsg-v05825-v05840-2026-06-18.
git rm --cached scripts/*.ps1.bak (eighth review) and update the stale path-extends rationale comment in building.gd.

Close the duplicate ASSETS rows (br-assets-manifest-regen-2026-06-18 plus the phantom wts-2026-06-19-br-stale-assets-md), and triage the P1 wts-2026-06-16-br-git-index-corrupt and the eight-day br-architecture-snapshot-refresh-2026-06-11.
